gift.title: The Perfect Gift for Young Readers
gift.text: Looking for a gift idea for children? Country Balls comic books are funny, action-packed adventures loved by boys and girls aged 8–17 — made by a kid who loves comics just like them. Available on Amazon worldwide.

about.title: About the Author
about.subtitle: The mind behind Country Balls
about.giftText: Looking for a present idea for children? Whether you need gift ideas for boys or gift ideas for girls, the Country Balls children's comic books are a hit with young readers aged 8–17 — bold colours, short stories, and adventures kids can actually relate to.
